name: handoff-bundle-writing
description: Manual-first workflow for turning an in-progress, paused, interrupted, or transferred run into a structured handoff bundle with current state, completed work, remaining work, blockers, next step, and artifact references for safe resume. Use when execution has already started and the next need is transfer, pause, or recovery context. Do not use for pre-execution briefing, memory writeback, generic summarization, or run-state sync.
